items.title_en: Firefox 148 Launches with AI Kill Switch Feature and More Enhancements
items.title_zh: Firefox 148 发布，新增 AI 关停开关及其他改进
items.summary_en: Mozilla releases Firefox 148 with an AI kill switch to disable AI-powered features, addressing privacy and control concerns. The release also packs performance and UI improvements, along with developer-focused enhancements that streamline workflows.
items.summary_zh: Mozilla 发布 Firefox 148，新增可禁用 AI 功能的关停开关，提升隐私控制。该版本还带来性能与界面优化，以及面向开发者的若干功能增强，进一步完善工作流。

items.title_en: Blood test boosts Alzheimer's diagnosis accuracy to 94.5%, clinical study shows
items.title_zh: 血液检测将阿尔茨海默病诊断准确率提升至94.5%，临床研究证实
items.summary_en: A clinical study reports a blood test raises Alzheimer's diagnostic accuracy to 94.5%. If replicated, it could enable cheaper, scalable, earlier diagnosis compared with imaging and CSF methods, potentially enabling earlier interventions and better trial enrollment. The result could accelerate adoption of blood-based biomarkers in neurology.
items.summary_zh: 一项临床研究显示，血液检测将阿尔茨海默病的诊断准确率提升至94.5%。若进一步验证并普及，这种低成本、可扩展的生物标志物检测有望与成像、CSF检测互补，实现更早期的诊断和患者分层。

items.title_en: The Age Verification Trap: Verifying age undermines everyone's data protection
items.title_zh: 年龄验证陷阱：核验年龄削弱了大家的数据保护
items.summary_en: Age-verification schemes often require collecting sensitive data and cross-site tracking, expanding surveillance rather than protecting minors. The piece argues these checks undermine data protection for everyone and urges privacy-preserving approaches. It highlights the design trade-offs between safety goals and privacy.
items.summary_zh: 年龄验证方案常常需要收集敏感数据并进行跨站追踪，扩大了监控范围而非保护未成年人。文章认为此类验证削弱了所有用户的数据保护，并呼吁采用隐私保护的替代方案。还强调在安全目标与隐私之间的设计权衡。

items.title_en: Americans are destroying Flock surveillance cameras
items.title_zh: 美国人正在破坏 Flock 监控摄像头
items.summary_en: Vandalism targeting Flock surveillance cameras raises urgent questions about the balance between security infrastructure and civil liberties. The incidents spotlight tensions around public monitoring and potential policy responses.
items.summary_zh: 对 Flock 监控摄像头的破坏行为将安全基础设施与公民自由之间的平衡推向前台。事件凸显公众监控的张力以及可能的政策应对。

items.title_en: Ladybird adopts Rust, with help from AI
items.title_zh: Ladybird 项目采用 Rust 编程语言
items.summary_en: Ladybird migrates code to Rust to improve safety and performance, reflecting Rust’s growing role in developer-focused tooling. The move signals a broader shift toward memory-safety in practical applications.
items.summary_zh: Ladybird 项目转向 Rust 以提升安全性与性能，体现了 Rust 在开发者工具领域日益重要的地位。此举标志着对内存安全的持续重视。

items.title_en: Binance fired employees who found $1.7B in crypto was sent to Iran
items.title_zh: 币安解雇发现约17亿美元加密资金流向伊朗的员工
items.summary_en: Reports claim Binance fired employees who flagged $1.7B in crypto movements toward Iran, highlighting compliance, geopolitical risks, and whistleblower dynamics in crypto firms. The case raises questions about internal controls and regulatory exposure.
items.summary_zh: 报道称币安解雇了揭露约17亿美元加密资金流向伊朗的员工，凸显合规与地缘政治风险以及加密行业的吹哨人处境。此事引发对内部控制与监管暴露的讨论。

items.title_en: FreeBSD doesn't have Wi-Fi driver for my old MacBook, so AI built one for me
items.title_zh: FreeBSD 没有为我的老款 MacBook 提供 Wi-Fi 驱动，结果 AI 给我写了一个
items.summary_en: The author used AI to generate a Wi‑Fi driver for an old MacBook on FreeBSD, bridging hardware support gaps. This demonstrates how AI-assisted coding can empower users to revive legacy devices, though reliability and licensing require caution.
items.summary_zh: 作者利用 AI 为一台老款 MacBook 在 FreeBSD 上生成了 Wi‑Fi 驱动，弥合了硬件支持的空白。此案例展示了 AI 辅助编程在让旧设备延寿方面的潜力，但稳定性和许可合规性需要注意。

items.title_en: Shatner is making an album with 35 metal icons
items.title_zh: 夏特纳将与35位金属乐坛大咖合作新专辑
items.summary_en: William Shatner is assembling an all-star lineup of 35 metal icons for a new album. The project blends spoken-word performance with heavy metal, illustrating how celebrity collaborations continue to reshape music distribution and audience engagement in the streaming era.
items.summary_zh: 威廉·夏特纳将携35位金属乐界大咖合作新专辑，融合说唱与重金属表演，体现名人合作在流媒体时代对音乐分发和观众互动的影响持续扩大。

items.title_en: Show HN: X86CSS – An x86 CPU emulator written in CSS
items.title_zh: Show HN: X86CSS——一个用 CSS 编写的 x86 CPU 模拟器
items.summary_en: X86CSS is a CPU emulator implemented entirely in CSS, a playful demonstration of how far browser styling can stretch. It showcases CSS’s expressive potential and may inspire playful explorations of browser capabilities and esoteric computation.
items.summary_zh: X86CSS 是一个纯 CSS 实现的 x86 CPU 模拟器，展示了 CSS 的表达能力与浏览器渲染管线的边界。尽管不具实用性，但能激发对浏览器能力和极客计算的探索。

items.title_en: I Ported Coreboot to the ThinkPad X270
items.title_zh: 我将 Coreboot 移植到 ThinkPad X270
items.summary_en: The author reports porting Coreboot to the ThinkPad X270, enabling open-source firmware on the model. This can improve boot times and security while offering more transparency about hardware initialization, though it may require workarounds for some hardware features.
items.summary_zh: 作者完成了将 Coreboot 移植到 ThinkPad X270 的工作，使该型号获得开源固件、潜在提升启动速度和安全性，但需权衡驱动与硬件兼容性的挑战。

items.title_en: Show HN: Steerling-8B, a language model that can explain any token it generates
items.title_zh: Show HN: Steerling-8B，一种能够解释其生成的任意标记的语言模型
items.summary_en: Steerling-8B is a base model release that can explain every token it generates, enabling end-to-end interpretability. While this enhances auditability and safety, it can add design complexity and potentially impact latency or output quality.
items.summary_zh: Steerling-8B 是一个基础模型，能够对每个生成的标记给出解释，从而提升可解释性与可审计性。该特性虽有助于安全性，但也可能增加实现复杂度并影响延迟或输出质量。

items.title_en: I built Timeframe, our family e-paper dashboard
items.title_zh: Timeframe，我们家的电子纸仪表板
items.summary_en: Timeframe is a family e-paper dashboard that runs on a low-power display for glanceable updates. It aggregates calendar, weather, and household notes, offering a less distracting alternative to smartphone widgets.
items.summary_zh: Timeframe 是一个用于家庭的电子纸仪表板，利用低功耗显示实现一眼可览的更新。它整合日历、天气和家务简报等信息，提供比手机通知更少干扰的主页式信息源。

items.title_en: ASML unveils EUV light source advance that could yield 50% more chips by 2030
items.title_zh: ASML 公布可至2030年提高50%芯片产量的EUV光源进展
items.summary_en: ASML reports a breakthrough in EUV light source efficiency or power, enabling more wafers to be produced per unit time; if realized, it could materially boost chip throughput by 50% by 2030 and power the next-gen nodes.
items.summary_zh: ASML 披露 EUV 光源效率/功率方面的突破，若实现将提升单位时间内的晶圆产出，到 2030 年有望带来约 50% 的芯片吞吐量提升。

items.title_en: You are not supposed to install OpenClaw on your personal computer
items.title_zh: 不应在个人电脑上安装 OpenClaw
items.summary_en: A cautionary note advising against installing OpenClaw on personal hardware due to safety, ethical, or legal concerns. It discusses risks of misuse and emphasizes the importance of controlled environments for powerful tools.
items.summary_zh: 警示性文章提醒避免在个人硬件上安装 OpenClaw，出于安全、伦理或法律原因考虑。讨论了误用风险，并强调对强大工具在受控环境中的使用的重要性。

items.title_en: Iowa farmers are leading the fight for repair
items.title_zh: 爱荷华州农民在修理权斗争中走在前线
items.summary_en: Iowa farmers are leading a repair-rights push for farm equipment, pushing back against manufacturer lock-in and repair restrictions. The movement highlights hardware freedom trends with implications for farmer costs, equipment longevity, and open repair ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 爱荷华州农民正引领修理权倡议，抵制厂商对农机的锁定与维修限制。此运动凸显硬件自由化趋势，对农民成本、设备寿命及开放修理生态系统具有深远影响。

items.title_en: Flock cameras gifted by Horowitz Foundation, avoiding public oversight
items.title_zh: Horowitz 基金会捐赠的 Flock 摄像头，规避公众监督
items.summary_en: A philanthropic gift of Flock cameras from Horowitz Foundation has drawn scrutiny over public oversight of surveillance tech used by law enforcement.
items.summary_zh: Horowitz 基金会捐赠的 Flock 摄像头引发对警务监控技术公众监督的关注。文章分析治理缺口，并呼吁加强社区参与。

items.title_en: Making Wolfram Tech Available as a Foundation Tool for LLM Systems
items.title_zh: 让 Wolfram 技术成为大模型系统的基础工具
items.summary_en: The post advocates exposing Wolfram computational tools as foundational capabilities for LLM systems, enabling reliable math, data queries, and symbolic reasoning. Integrating such tools can reduce hallucinations and improve correctness, shaping how AI tooling ecosystems evolve.
items.summary_zh: 该文章主张将 Wolfram 的计算工具作为大模型系统的基础能力，以提升数学运算、数据查询和符号推理的可靠性。将这些工具嵌入 AI 系统有助于降低幻觉、提高正确性，影响 AI 工具生态的演进。

items.title_en: “Car Wash” test with 53 models
items.title_zh: “Car Wash”测试涵盖53个模型
items.summary_en: A Car Wash-style evaluation was run across 53 models to benchmark behavior in safety and alignment checks. The results reveal wide variation in robustness and underscore the need for rigorous, standardized testing when choosing models for production.
items.summary_zh: 对53个模型进行了“Car Wash”测试，评估其在安全性与对齐方面的表现。结果显示模型之间的鲁棒性差异显著，强调在生产中需要更严格、标准化的测试流程。

items.title_en: Elsevier shuts down its finance journal citation cartel
items.title_zh: 爱思唯尔结束其金融期刊引文垄断
items.summary_en: Elsevier shuts down its finance journal citation cartel
items.summary_zh: 爱思唯尔结束其金融期刊引文垄断的争议性做法，可能影响学术评价体系与出版格局。此举或将改变研究者的发表策略。

items.title_en: UNIX99, a UNIX-like OS for the TI-99/4A (2025)
items.title_zh: UNIX99：面向 TI-99/4A 的类 UNIX 操作系统
items.summary_en: A modern UNIX-like OS has been built for the TI-99/4A, reviving interest in vintage hardware. The project demonstrates how contemporary tooling and practices can breathe new life into legacy platforms while offering a playful look at system design continuity.
items.summary_zh: 为 TI-99/4A 构建的类 UNIX 操作系统重新点燃了对复古硬件的兴趣。该项目展示了当代工具链如何为遗留平台注入新生命，并以系统设计连贯性为乐趣。

items.title_en: Hetzner (European hosting provider) to increase prices by up to 38%
items.title_zh: Hetzner 将涨价至多 38%，欧洲云托管成本压力
items.summary_en: Hetzner (European hosting provider) to increase prices by up to 38%
items.summary_zh: Hetzner 将最高涨价至 38%，凸显欧洲云托管成本压力。

items.title_en: Pope tells priests to use their brains, not AI, to write homilies
items.title_zh: 教皇让神父用脑子而非AI来写讲道
items.summary_en: Pope Francis urges priests to rely on human judgment rather than AI to craft homilies, signaling cautious boundaries for AI in sacred duties. The stance reflects broader debates about automation's role in culturally sensitive work.
items.summary_zh: 教皇方济各呼吁神父在撰写讲道时优先运用人类判断，而非依赖 AI，标志着在宗教敏感工作中对 AI 的审慎边界。其观点映射出自动化在文化性强工作中的广泛辩论。

items.title_en: Show HN: PgDog – Scale Postgres without changing the app
items.title_zh: Show HN: PgDog——在不改动应用的情况下扩展 Postgres
items.summary_en: PgDog provides a drop-in scale layer for PostgreSQL that lets you scale without touching application code. It acts as a proxy and sharding/ load-balancing layer, routing queries to multiple nodes. This approach lets teams upgrade capacity with minimal risk.
items.summary_zh: PgDog 提供一个无需改动应用即可扩展 PostgreSQL 的层，充当代理/分片与负载均衡层，按需将查询路由到多台节点。此举使团队在最小风险下提升容量。

items.title_en: Show HN: enveil – hide your .env secrets from prAIng eyes
items.title_zh: Show HN：enveil — 将 .env 密钥隐藏，防止被窥探
items.summary_en: enveil is a tool designed to hide your .env secrets from prying eyes, reducing the risk of secrets leaking in code reviews and public repos. It helps teams keep credentials out of the Git history and CI logs while developing.
items.summary_zh: enveil 是一款用于在代码和工作流中隐藏 .env 秘密的工具，降低在代码评审和公开仓库中暴露凭据的风险。它帮助团队在开发过程中将机密信息从 Git 历史和 CI 日志中剥离。

items.title_en: Google restricting Google AI Pro/Ultra subscribers for using OpenClaw
items.title_zh: Google 限制 Google AI Pro/Ultra 用户使用 OpenClaw
items.summary_en: Reportedly, Google restricted Google AI Pro/Ultra subscribers from using OpenClaw, highlighting friction between premium tooling ecosystems and access controls. The incident underscores how platform policies can affect power users and third-party tooling.
items.summary_zh: 有用户声称 Google AI Pro/Ultra 用户在使用 OpenClaw 时遭遇账户限制，且未事先警告。事件凸显了高端工具生态与访问控制之间的矛盾，以及平台策略对开发者的影响。

items.title_en: A simple web we own
items.title_zh: 我们拥有的一个简单网页
items.summary_en: A simple, self-owned web project that emphasizes control and resilience over platform dependence. It showcases what a minimal, maintainable web presence looks like and why ownership matters in infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 一个简单、由自己掌控的网页项目，强调对平台依赖的抵抗力和可控性。展示了最小化、易维护的网页存在感，以及拥有自主基础设施的重要性。

items.title_en: The peculiar case of Japanese web design (2022)
items.title_zh: 日本网页设计的怪异案例（2022）
items.summary_en: Japanese web design in 2022 displays distinctive patterns—dense typography, bold color blocks, and atypical navigation—reflecting cultural aesthetics and local constraints. It provides a snapshot of regional UI trends for designers and engineers.
items.summary_zh: 2022 年日本网页设计呈现独特风格：排版密集、色块对比大胆、导航方式异常，折射当地文化美学与约束。文章分析了这些设计选择如何影响日本网站的用户体验，并为设计师和工程师提供区域性趋势洞察。

items.title_en: Magical Mushroom – Europe's first industrial-scale mycelium packaging producer
items.title_zh: 神奇蘑菇：欧洲首家工业级菌丝体包装生产商
items.summary_en: Europe's first industrial-scale producer of mycelium-based packaging is scaling up, offering a plastic-free alternative with lower carbon footprint. The effort could disrupt packaging supply chains, but macro-scale manufacturing, supply, and regulatory hurdles remain.
items.summary_zh: 欧洲首家以菌丝体为材料的工业级包装生产商正在扩大产能，提供无塑料、低碳足迹的包装替代方案。此举可能扰动包装供应链，但大规模生产、供应与监管障碍仍需克服。

items.title_en: NIST Seeking Public Comment on AI Agent Security (Deadline: March 9, 2026)
items.title_zh: NIST 就 AI Agent 安全性征求公众意见（截至2026年3月9日）
items.summary_en: NIST is seeking public comment on AI agent security, inviting input on threat models, governance, and practical controls. The process signals increasing regulatory attention to AI agent safety and interoperability for vendors and users.
items.summary_zh: NIST 正就 AI 助手安全性征求公众意见，邀请就威胁模型、治理与实际控制措施提供反馈。该进程表明监管对 AI 助手安全与互操作性的关注日益增加，影响厂商和用户的设计与部署。

items.title_en: Terence Tao, at 8 years old (1984) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 8岁时的陶哲轩 [PDF]
items.summary_en: A PDF collection highlights Terence Tao's precocious mathematical work at age 8, offering a rare glimpse into the early signs of extraordinary mathematical talent. The material helps illuminate how prodigies develop and the kinds of problems that capture a gifted child’s imagination.
items.summary_zh: 一份 PDF 收藏展示了陶哲轩在8岁时的早期数学工作，提供了对天才数学天赋早期迹象的罕见洞见。资料有助于理解天才儿童的成长路径，以及哪些问题能吸引他们深度投入。

items.title_en: Show HN: Babyshark – Wireshark made easy (terminal UI for PCAPs)
items.title_zh: Show HN：Babyshark——为PCAP提供更易用的 Wireshark 终端界面
items.summary_en: Babyshark delivers a terminal UI for PCAP analysis, making packet inspection accessible without a GUI. This Show HN project could accelerate quick network investigations for developers and security researchers alike.
items.summary_zh: Babyshark 提供一个 PCAP 分析的终端界面，让在无 GUI 的环境下也能进行数据包查看。该 Show HN 项目可能提升开发者与安全研究者的排查效率。

items.title_en: Writing code is cheap now
items.title_zh: 如今写代码成本更低
items.summary_en: Code is cheap now thanks to AI-assisted tooling and automation, enabling rapid experimentation and iteration. The piece outlines agentic engineering patterns that leverage automation to build software faster and reshape team workflows.
items.summary_zh: 如今借助 AI 助手与自动化，写代码的成本显著下降，支持快速试验与迭代。文章提出了利用自动化实现高效软件开发的代理式工程模式，并改变团队工作方式。

items.title_en: What it means that Ubuntu is using Rust
items.title_zh: Ubuntu 使用 Rust 的含义
items.summary_en: Ubuntu's shift to Rust signals a broader industry move toward memory-safe, high-performance code in core tooling. Rust can reduce bugs in critical components and improve security, but it also brings integration and maintenance challenges for the distro’s ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Ubuntu 将核心工具转向 Rust，标志着业界在核心组件采用更安全且高效的内存管理语言的趋势。Rust 能降低关键组件中的漏洞、提升安全性，但也对发行版生态的集成与维护带来挑战。

items.title_en: Show HN: Sowbot – Open-hardware agricultural robot (ROS2, RTK GPS)
items.title_zh: Show HN: Sowbot——开源硬件农用机器人（ROS2、RTK GPS）
items.summary_en: Sowbot is an open-hardware agricultural robot built with ROS2 and RTK GPS for autonomous farming tasks. It aims to democratize precision agriculture by letting growers customize hardware and software. The project showcases how open-source robotics can accelerate farming innovations.
items.summary_zh: Sowbot 是一个使用 ROS2 和 RTK GPS 的开源硬件农用机器人，具 autonomic 农业任务能力。它旨在让农民自定义硬件与软件，从而民主化精准农业。该项目展示了开源机器人在农业创新中的潜力。

items.title_en: Loops is a federated, open-source TikTok
items.title_zh: Loops：一个联邦化的开源 TikTok
items.summary_en: Loops is a federated, open-source TikTok-like platform aiming to decentralize social video. It uses federation to connect independent servers, potentially improving user control and moderation. The project signals a shift toward interoperable social apps beyond centralized goliaths.
items.summary_zh: Loops 是一个联邦化的开源短视频平台，目标是去中心化社交视频。通过服务器自治与互联，提升用户对数据与治理的控制，并探索可互操作的社交网格。

items.title_en: The challenges of porting Shufflepuck Cafe to the 8 bits Apple II
items.title_zh: 将 Shufflepuck Cafe 移植到 8 位 Apple II 的挑战
items.summary_en: Porting Shufflepuck Cafe to the Apple II’s 8-bit era exposes tight memory, CPU, and graphics constraints that force creative engineering. The piece details the trade-offs developers face when bringing modern gameplay to vintage hardware.
items.summary_zh: 将 Shufflepuck Cafe 移植到 8 位 Apple II 时代暴露出内存、CPU 与图形限制，迫使开发者进行创新性工程权衡。文章讲述将现代游戏移植到老硬件时的取舍。

items.title_en: Show HN: CIA World Factbook Archive (1990–2025), searchable and exportable
items.title_zh: CIA 世界要览档案（1990–2025）
items.summary_en: Archive makes CIA World Factbook data (1990–2025) searchable and exportable, enabling researchers to track geopolitical trends over time. The dataset enables comparative country profiles and historical analyses.
items.summary_zh: 该档案将 1990–2025 年的 CIA 世界要览数据设为可检索并可导出，便于对比国家档案与地缘政治趋势。研究人员可以据此追踪历史演变。

items.title_en: Attention Media ≠ Social Networks
items.title_zh: 注意力媒体与社交网络的区别
items.summary_en: Attention media are engineered to maximize engagement, while social networks prioritize network effects and user-generated content.
items.summary_zh: 注意力媒体被设计来最大化参与度，而社交网络以网络效应和用户生成内容为核心。本文探讨了对出版商、开发者和平台设计的影响，强调信任、盈利模式与内容韧性等方面的后果。

items.title_en: Decided to fly to the US to buy some hard drives
items.title_zh: 决定飞往美国购买硬盘
items.summary_en: A personal post about flying to the US to buy hard drives, reflecting on supply-chain frictions, pricing, and the lengths enthusiasts go to for storage.
items.summary_zh: 一则个人帖子讲述因硬盘短缺而飞赴美国采购的经历，反映了供应链摩擦、价格波动以及存储爱好者为获取硬件所走的极端路径。

items.title_en: IBM Plunges After Anthropic's Latest Update Takes on COBOL
items.title_zh: Anthropic 的最新更新挑战 COBOL，IBM 股价走低
items.summary_en: Anthropic’s latest update targeting COBOL compatibility spooks investors, causing IBM shares to slip as enterprise software longevity and AI capabilities intersect in unexpected ways.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 的最新更新在 COBOL 兼容性方面发力，令投资者感到担忧，导致 IBM 股价回落，凸显企业软件传统与 AI 能力的错综关系。

items.title_en: femtolisp: A lightweight, robust, scheme-like Lisp implementation
items.title_zh: femtolisp：一种轻量、稳健的 Scheme 风格 Lisp 实现
items.summary_en: femtolisp is a compact Lisp implementation inspired by Scheme, prioritizing small footprint and robust semantics for embedding or experimentation. It offers a pleasant sandbox for language enthusiasts to explore Lisp VM design.
items.summary_zh: femtolisp 是一个受 Scheme 启发的轻量 Lisp 实现，关注极小体积与稳健语义，适合嵌入式场景和语言实验。为语言爱好者提供了一个探索 Lisp 虚拟机设计的便携环境。

items.title_en: Why Your Load Balancer Still Sends Traffic to Dead Backends
items.title_zh: 为什么负载均衡仍会把流量发给已死后端
items.summary_en: A discussion on why load balancers can still route traffic to dead backends due to misconfigured health checks or stale state. It contrasts client-side and server-side health checks and offers practical fixes to improve uptime.
items.summary_zh: 探讨由于健康检查配置错误或状态陈旧，负载均衡仍会将流量路由到失效后端的原因，并对比客户端与服务器端健康检查，给出提升可用性的实用修复建议。

items.title_en: The JavaScript Oxidation Compiler
items.title_zh: JavaScript 氧化编译器
items.summary_en: The JavaScript Oxidation Compiler introduces a new tool aimed at transforming JavaScript into a more optimizable representation, using Rust as its foundation. It seeks to raise performance and safety through advanced compilation techniques.
items.summary_zh: JavaScript 氧化编译器是一款新工具，旨在将 JavaScript 转换为更易优化的中间表示，核心使用 Rust 构建。它通过先进的编译技术寻求提升性能与安全性。

items.title_en: Show HN: AI Timeline – 171 LLMs from Transformer (2017) to GPT-5.3 (2026)
items.title_zh: Show HN：AI 时间线—从 Transformer 到 GPT-5.3 的171个模型
items.summary_en: A curated timeline charts 171 LLMs from Transformer-era models (2017) through GPT-5.3 (2026), illustrating scaling, architectural shifts, and capabilities growth. It helps readers grasp the pace and trajectories of modern AI.
items.summary_zh: 该时间线梳理了从 Transformer（2017）到 GPT-5.3（2026）的171个大型语言模型，展现了规模、结构演变和能力增长的趋势，帮助读者把握AI发展的节奏与方向。

items.title_en: Stop Killing Games update says EU petition advances
items.title_zh: Stop Killing Games 更新：欧盟请愿取得进展
items.summary_en: An EU petition related to Stop Killing Games appears to be gaining traction, signaling growing regulatory and advocacy attention. The development affects digital rights and how policy makers approach gaming-related issues.
items.summary_zh: Stop Killing Games 的欧盟请愿似乎正在获得关注，显示出监管与倡议活动的增长势头。此事将影响数字权利与政策制定者对游戏相关议题的处理方式。

items.title_en: VTT Test Donut Lab Battery Reaches 80% Charge in Under 10 Minutes [pdf]
items.title_zh: VTT 测试圆环形电池在10分钟内充至80%
items.summary_en: VTT's donut-shaped lab battery reaches 80% charge in under 10 minutes, signaling progress in fast charging tech. The result highlights potential gains for EV charging and battery design, while noting scale-up and efficiency questions.
items.summary_zh: VTT 的圆环形实验室电池在不到10分钟内充到80%，展示快速充电技术的进展。该结果可能推动电动汽车充电与电池设计的潜在改进，但大规模生产与能量密度仍需验证。

items.title_en: Hacker News.love – 22 projects Hacker News didn't love
items.title_zh: Hacker News.love：22 个不被 Hacker News 喜爱的项目
items.summary_en: A look at 22 projects that failed to win favor on Hacker News, revealing platform tastes, friction points, or novelty biases. The list offers practical lessons for creators about framing and audience alignment.
items.summary_zh: 汇总了在 Hacker News 上未受青睐的22个项目，揭示社区口味、摩擦点以及新颖性偏好。为开发者提供在定位与呈现方面的实用教训。

items.title_en: Man accidentally gains control of 7k robot vacuums
items.title_zh: 男子意外获得对约 7000 台扫地机器人的控制权
items.summary_en: A man inadvertently gains control of around 7,000 robotic vacuums, exposing how insecure IoT deployments can be weaponized or misused. The incident spotlights the need for safer defaults, firmware updates, and robust access controls in consumer robotics. It also raises questions about surveillance perimeter and botnet risk in dense deployments.
items.summary_zh: 一名男子在不经意间获得对约 7000 台扫地机器人的控制权，暴露了物联设备的安全漏洞。此事件凸显了对普通消费级机器人设定更安全的默认设置、固件更新与访问控制的必要性。与此同时也引发对在密集部署中的监控与僵尸网络风险的关注。

items.title_en: Large study finds link between cannabis use in teens and psychosis later
items.title_zh: 大型研究发现青少年大麻使用与后期精神病风险相关
items.summary_en: A longitudinal study links teen cannabis use with higher risk of psychosis later, with effects depending on frequency and age of use. The findings contribute to debates on policy and adolescent health.
items.summary_zh: 纵向研究发现青少年大麻使用与 later 概念的精神病风险增加相关，频率和使用年龄影响强度。这一结果为政策和青少年健康辩论提供了证据。

items.title_en: Six Math Essentials
items.title_zh: 六大数学要点
items.summary_en: Terence Tao highlights six foundational math concepts that underpin a wide range of proofs and problem-solving strategies. The piece offers intuition and practical takeaways for students and researchers aiming to deepen mathematical thinking.
items.summary_zh: 陶哲轩（Terry Tao）强调六个基础数学概念，这些概念支撑着大量证明与解题策略。文章为希望深化数学思维的学生和研究者提供直觉性解读与实用要点。

items.title_en: Detecting and Preventing Distillation Attacks
items.title_zh: 检测与防止蒸馏攻击
items.summary_en: Anthropic outlines detection and mitigation strategies for distillation attacks on AI models, addressing security risks when compressing AI models and preserving safety.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 提出检测与缓解 AI 蒸馏攻击的策略，聚焦在对模型压缩过程中的安全风险与安全性保持。

items.title_en: Crawling a billion web pages in just over 24 hours, in 2025
items.title_zh: 在2025年，仅用24小时就爬取十亿网页
items.summary_en: A web crawling project demonstrates scaling to a billion pages in just over 24 hours, highlighting architecture choices, distributed crawling strategies, and data management challenges.
items.summary_zh: 该项目在约24小时内爬取一十亿网页，凸显分布式爬虫架构、抓取调度与数据管理方面的要点与挑战。

items.title_en: A lithium-ion breakthrough that could boost range and lower costs
items.title_zh: 可能提升续航并大幅降成本的锂离子技术突破
items.summary_en: Researchers report a lithium-ion breakthrough that could extend EV range and dramatically reduce costs, potentially reshaping battery supply chains and vehicle pricing.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员披露一项锂离子技术突破，或有望提升电动车续航并显著降低成本，或将重塑电池供应链与车辆定价。

items.title_en: Fix your tools
items.title_zh: 修复你的工具
items.summary_en: A pragmatic guide to auditing and repairing your development tools and workflows to boost reliability and speed.
items.summary_zh: 提供一个务实的指南，用于审视并修复开发工具与工作流，以提升可靠性和效率。

items.title_en: Anthropic Education the AI Fluency Index
items.title_zh: Anthropic 发布 AI 流畅度指数教育版
items.summary_en: Anthropic's AI Fluency Index measures how well people can understand and interact with AI systems. The index has implications for education, policy, and workforce readiness as AI tools become more embedded in work and life. It signals a push to quantify AI literacy beyond basic exposure.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 的 AI 流畅度指数衡量人们理解和使用 AI 系统的能力。该指数关系到教育、政策和职场适应性，随着 AI 工具融入日常工作与生活，它强调不仅是接触，还需具备深入的 AI 素养。

items.title_en: Show HN: Local-First Linux MicroVMs for macOS
items.title_zh: Show HN：在 macOS 上的本地优先 Linux MicroVMs
items.summary_en: Show HN introduces a locally-run Linux microVM setup on macOS, designed for offline development and sandboxed experiments. By emphasizing local-first operation, it reduces reliance on cloud services and improves reproducibility.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示在 macOS 上本地运行的 Linux microVM 的方案，适合离线开发及沙箱实验。强调本地优先的工作方式，降低对云端的依赖，并提升可重复性。

items.title_en: SETI@home: Data Acquisition and Front-End Processing (2025)
items.title_zh: SETI@home：数据获取与前端处理（2025）
items.summary_en: A 2025 assessment of SETI@home’s data acquisition and frontend processing pipelines, highlighting improvements in distributed volunteer computing, data validation, and real-time signal analysis. The work underscores citizen science’s ongoing role in large-scale data exploration.
items.summary_zh: 对 SETI@home 在2025年的数据获取与前端处理管线进行评估，聚焦分布式志愿计算、数据校验和实时信号分析的改进，显示公民科学在大规模数据探测中的持续价值。

items.title_en: AI-powered reverse-engineering of Rosetta 2 (for Linux VM)
items.title_zh: 基于 AI 的 Rosetta 2 逆向工程（用于 Linux 虚拟机）
items.summary_en: An AI-powered tool aims to reverse-engineer Rosetta 2 for Linux VMs, enabling smoother x86_64/ARM translation in virtualization contexts. It demonstrates how AI can assist cross-platform compatibility work.
items.summary_zh: 一个 AI 驱动的工具旨在让 Rosetta 2 在 Linux 虚拟机上工作，提升虚拟化环境中的跨平台兼容性。展示了 AI 在跨平台兼容性任务中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: AI is destroying open source, and it's not even good yet [video]
items.title_zh: AI 正在摧毁开源，甚至还没成熟 [视频]
items.summary_en: A video arguing that AI-powered coding tools threaten open-source ecosystems, highlighting licensing ambiguity and potential shifts in contribution dynamics. It questions sustainability as AI tools become more capable and pervasive.
items.summary_zh: 视频讨论了 AI 代码工具可能对开源生态造成的冲击，聚焦许可不清晰与贡献生态的潜在转变。随着 AI 工具能力提升、应用日益广泛，持续性成为关注点。

items.title_en: The rise of eyes began with just one
items.title_zh: 眼睛的演化从一个起点开始
items.summary_en: A feature on how eyes evolved as complex organs, tracing how early photoreceptor cells diversified into diverse eye types across species. It highlights the modular nature of biological innovation and how a single starting point can lead to vast diversity.
items.summary_zh: 文章讲述眼睛作为复杂器官的进化过程，追溯早期光感受器细胞如何在不同物种中演化出多样的眼部结构，强调生物创新的模块化特性以及一个起点如何孕育出广泛的多样性。

items.title_en: NASA uses Mars Helicopter's SoC for rover navigation upgrade
items.title_zh: NASA 将火星直升机的系统级芯片用于车载导航升级
items.summary_en: NASA is upgrading rover navigation using the Mars Helicopter's SoC, enabling more autonomous routing and reducing reliance on ground control.
items.summary_zh: NASA 将火星直升机的 SoC 用于升级车载导航，提升自主路径规划能力，减少对地面控制的依赖。

items.title_en: Xweather Live – Interactive global vector weather map
items.title_zh: Xweather Live：全球矢量天气地图的交互式体验
items.summary_en: Xweather Live presents an interactive, vector-based global weather map that updates in real time. By using vector tiles, it can render smooth zoomable weather data across scales while keeping file size modest. The project highlights how vector-based weather visualization can offer scalable clarity for dashboards and research.
items.summary_zh: Xweather Live 提供一个交互式的全球矢量天气地图，支持实时更新。通过矢量切片实现，可以在不同尺度下平滑缩放并保持较小的文件尺寸。该项目凸显了矢量化天气可视化在仪表盘和研究中的可扩展清晰度。

items.title_en: Facebook's Fascination with My Robots.txt
items.title_zh: Facebook 对 robots.txt 的迷恋
items.summary_en: A look at how Facebook enforces crawling rules via robots.txt and related controls, revealing tensions between platform governance and data access. The approach has implications for researchers, competitors, and developers seeking data from social networks.
items.summary_zh: 本文揭示 Facebook 如何通过 robots.txt 及相关抓取规则管理数据访问，体现平台治理与数据开放之间的张力。此举可能影响研究者、竞争对手及开发者在社交网络上的数据获取策略。

items.title_en: Git's Magic Files
items.title_zh: Git 的魔法文件
items.summary_en: The article digs into Git's lesser-known magic files—configurations and attributes that alter how Git behaves beyond ordinary commands. It explains how files like .gitattributes and .gitignore influence merging, pathspecs, and cross-repo tooling. The takeaway is that small, well-chosen magic files can dramatically simplify repository hygiene and collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 文章梳理了 Git 中鲜为人知的神奇/魔法文件及其对行为的影响。它解释了 .gitattributes、.gitignore 等文件如何影响合并、路径模式以及跨仓工具。小而巧妙的“魔法文件”可以显著简化仓库治理与协作。

items.title_en: Hello Worg, the Org-Mode Community
items.title_zh: 你好，Worg，Org-Mode 社区
items.summary_en: Worg is the Org-mode community site with documentation, tutorials, and examples. It serves as a hub for sharing tips, workflows, and plugin setups among Emacs users.
items.summary_zh: Worg 是 Org-mode 社区的官方站点，提供文档、教程和示例，成为 Emacs 用户交流技巧、工作流与插件配置的重要枢纽。

items.title_en: Emulated Windows 3.11 in the Browser
items.title_zh: 在浏览器中仿真 Windows 3.11
items.summary_en: An in-browser emulator runs Windows 3.11, letting users experience early Windows nostalgia without external VM setups. It highlights WebAssembly-era possibilities for preserving legacy software and teaching operating-system history.
items.summary_zh: 在浏览器中运行的 Windows 3.11 模拟器让用户无需额外虚拟机即可体验早期 Windows 的怀旧，同时体现了 WebAssembly 推动下的遗留软件保存与操作系统史教育的潜力。

items.title_en: Linuxulator on FreeBSD Feels Like Magic
items.title_zh: FreeBSD 上的 Linuxulator 给人魔法般的体验
items.summary_en: Linuxulator provides Linux ABI compatibility on FreeBSD, letting Linux binaries run on FreeBSD almost seamlessly. The post shares surprising ease of use and performance characteristics, highlighting FreeBSD's continued relevance for developers who want Linux compatibility.
items.summary_zh: Linuxulator 为 FreeBSD 提供 Linux 二进制接口兼容性，使常见 Linux 应用几乎无缝在 FreeBSD 上运行。文中分享了令人惊喜的易用性与性能表现，凸显 FreeBSD 在寻求 Linux 兼容性开发者中的持续价值。

items.title_en: Using the new bridges of FreeBSD 15
items.title_zh: 使用 FreeBSD 15 的新桥接功能
items.summary_en: FreeBSD 15's new bridging features enable simpler, more powerful network setups, with practical notes on configuring bridges, performance considerations, and potential use cases.
items.summary_zh: FreeBSD 15 的新桥接功能让网络配置更简单、强大，文章给出实际的配置要点、性能考量与潜在应用场景。

items.title_en: US Gov Deploys Grok as Nutrition Bot, It Advises for Rectal Use of Vegetables
items.title_zh: 美国政府部署 Grok 作为营养机器人，竟建议蔬菜直肠用法
items.summary_en: Grok is deployed as a government nutrition bot and has drawn attention for its controversial dietary guidance. The episode raises questions about AI safety, prompt design, and guardrails in public tools.
items.summary_zh: 报道描述政府将 Grok 部署为营养助手，并因其争议性饮食建议引发关注。事件凸显公众工具中 AI 安全、提示设计与治理边界的问题。

items.title_en: How Can Infinity Come in Many Sizes?
items.title_zh: 无穷大可以有多种尺寸吗？
items.summary_en: Explores the concept that infinity comes in many sizes through set theory, discussing cardinalities and the distinction between countable and uncountable infinities with approachable examples.
items.summary_zh: 从集合论角度解释无穷大并非单一量级，而是有多种不同的大小，通过基数比较与可数/不可数之分，给出易懂的示例。

items.title_en: What I learned designing a barebones UI engine
items.title_zh: 设计极简 UI 引擎的经验教训
items.summary_en: Designing a barebones UI engine teaches trade-offs between simplicity and feature richness, including rendering, input handling, accessibility, and platform quirks.
items.summary_zh: 记录在设计极简UI引擎过程中的取舍，涵盖渲染、输入处理、无障碍性以及跨平台差异等要点。

items.title_en: Pinterest is drowning in a sea of AI slop and auto-moderation
items.title_zh: Pinterest 面临 AI 内容泛滥与自动审核挑战
items.summary_en: Pinterest struggles with a flood of AI-generated content and the burden of auto-moderation, raising questions about content quality, moderation tools, and user experience.
items.summary_zh: Pinterest 正在应对 AI 生成内容泛滥和自动审核带来的质控与工作量问题，影响平台内容质量与用户体验。

items.title_en: Show HN: 3D Mahjong, Built in CSS
items.title_zh: Show HN：用 CSS 构建的 3D 麻将
items.summary_en: A Show HN project demonstrates 3D Mahjong rendered with pure CSS, showcasing how far CSS transforms and perspective can push browser rendering without heavy WebGL. The build serves as both a playful demo and a reference for CSS-driven 3D layouts. It hints at potential performance and accessibility tradeoffs for CSS-only approaches.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个 Show HN 项目，展示了用纯 CSS 实现的 3D 麻将。它展示了 CSS 变换和透视在无需 WebGL 的情况下实现 3D 的潜力。该作品既是趣味演示，也为 CSS 驱动的 3D 布局提供参考，同时提示了在纯 CSS 方法下的性能与可访问性取舍。

items.title_en: Fresh File Explorer – VS Code extension for navigating recent work
items.title_zh: Fresh File Explorer：VS Code 的最近工作导航扩展
items.summary_en: Fresh File Explorer is a VS Code extension designed to speed up navigation by exposing recent files and work sessions in an accessible panel. It reduces context-switching and helps developers jump back into work faster. The extension demonstrates a shift toward more ergonomic, task-focused tooling inside editors.
items.summary_zh: Fresh File Explorer 是一个 VS Code 扩展，旨在通过展示最近的文件和工作会话来提升导航效率。它可以减少上下文切换，帮助开发者更快回到正在做的事。这一扩展体现了编辑器内更注重任务导向的工具设计趋势。

items.title_en: Benchmarks for concurrent hash map implementations in Go
items.title_zh: Go 并发哈希映射实现基准测试
items.summary_en: A benchmarking study compares different concurrent map implementations in Go, highlighting trade-offs between speed, memory, and simplicity. It helps library authors and high-throughput apps choose the right data structure.
items.summary_zh: 基准测试比较了 Go 的多种并发哈希映射实现，揭示了速度、内存和实现复杂度之间的权衡。为开源库作者与高吞吐应用选择合适的数据结构提供参考。

items.title_en: How close are we to a vision for 2010?
items.title_zh: 离2010年的愿景还差多远？
items.summary_en: A reflection on how close we are to the 2010 tech vision, evaluating predictions about AI, mobile, the web, and hardware, and what actually materialized.
items.summary_zh: 回顾到2010年的科技愿景，评估AI、移动、网络与硬件领域的预测落地情况，揭示哪些已成真、哪些未实现。

items.title_en: Aqua: A CLI message tool for AI agents
items.title_zh: Aqua：用于 AI 代理的命令行消息工具
items.summary_en: Aqua provides a CLI to interact with AI agents, enabling scripted prompts, messaging, and orchestration of agent workflows. It aims to streamline multi-agent experimentation and automation for developers.
items.summary_zh: Aqua 提供一个命令行界面，用于与 AI 代理进行交互、发送消息并编排代理工作流。设计目标是加速多代理实验与自动化。

items.title_en: Ed's Stratego Site
items.title_zh: Ed 的 Stratego 站点
items.summary_en: Ed's Stratego Site offers rules, strategies, and resources for Stratego players, serving as a stable hub for board-game fans.
items.summary_zh: Ed's Stratego Site 提供 Stratego 的规则、策略与资源，成为桌游爱好者的稳定信息中心。

items.title_en: The Tears of Donald Knuth (2015)
items.title_zh: 唐纳德·克努斯之泪（2015）
items.summary_en: The Tears of Donald Knuth is an opinion piece reflecting on the emotional dimensions of long-running contributions to CS and typography, using Knuth as a touchstone.
items.summary_zh: 这篇观点文章以 Knuth 的情感表达为线索，讨论科技领域长期贡献者在面对挑战时的情感与坚持。

items.title_en: Sub-$200 Lidar could reshuffle auto sensor economics
items.title_zh: 不足200美元的激光雷达或将重塑汽车传感器经济
items.summary_en: Cheaper sub-$200 solid-state lidar could reshape the economics of automotive sensing, lowering per-vehicle sensor costs and accelerating ADAS adoption. But manufacturers still face hurdles in performance, reliability, and scalable production that will determine how quickly the market shifts.
items.summary_zh: 成本低廉的固态激光雷达可能重塑汽车传感器的经济格局，显著降低单车传感器成本并推动高级驾驶辅助系统的普及。然而要实现大规模生产，性能、可靠性与产能扩张仍是关键挑战。

items.title_en: ‘Viking’ was a job, not a matter of heredity: ancient DNA study (2020)
items.title_zh: ‘维京人’是职业，而非遗传决定：2020年的古DNA研究
items.summary_en: A 2020 ancient DNA study concluded that being Viking was more about the job and social role than heredity, challenging myths of a fixed genetic identity. The research emphasizes how social mobility and cultural practice shaped Viking identity.
items.summary_zh: 2020年的古DNA研究显示，成为维京人更多是职业身份而非遗传决定，这一发现打破了将维京身份简单归因于基因的神话。研究强调社会流动性与文化实践在维京人身份形成中的作用。

items.title_en: 0 A.D. Release 28: Boiorix
items.title_zh: 0 A.D. 发布 28 版：Boiorix
items.summary_en: Open-source RTS 0 A.D. releases Update 28 'Boiorix' with new content, UI polish, and AI tweaks, improving balance and performance across platforms. The update reinforces the project’s long-term community-driven development model.
items.summary_zh: 开源即时策略游戏0 A.D. 发布了28版 Boiorix，带来新文明、界面优化和 AI 调整，提升跨平台的平衡性与性能。此更新进一步巩固了以社区为驱动的长期开发路线。

items.title_en: Dictionary Compression is finally here, and it's ridiculously good
items.title_zh: 字典压缩技术终于问世，性能提升惊人
items.summary_en: A dictionary-based compression approach arrives with surprisingly strong performance gains over traditional methods, potentially reducing bandwidth and storage costs across systems.
items.summary_zh: 基于字典的压缩方法带来出色的性能提升，可能显著降低系统的带宽与存储成本，对各类应用场景都具潜在影响。

items.title_en: What I Learned After Building 3 TV Apps Coming from Mobile
items.title_zh: 从移动端到电视应用：构建3个电视应用后的所学
items.summary_en: Lessons learned migrating from mobile to TV apps cover UX constraints, remote-control navigation, app performance, and ecosystem differences, offering guidance for future cross-platform product work.
items.summary_zh: 分享从移动端迁移到电视应用的经验教训，涵盖用户体验、遥控导航、性能与生态系统差异，为后续跨平台开发提供指引。

items.title_en: My journey to the microwave alternate timeline
items.title_zh: 我通往微波炉的平行时间线之旅
items.summary_en: A reflective piece that uses a hypothetical journey to a microwave as a stand-in for exploring alternate timelines and the consequences of small tech decisions.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇个人随笔，以微波炉作为隐喻，探讨如何通过日常选择进入不同的时间线。作者反思理性决策与科技进展对人生轨迹的影响。

items.title_en: Pipelined Relational Query Language, Pronounced "Prequel"
items.title_zh: 管线化关系查询语言，发音为“Prequel”
items.summary_en: PRQL offers a pipeline-style query language that compiles to SQL, aiming to improve readability and composability of data queries. By enabling incremental abstractions and integration with existing databases, it could reshape analytics workflows.
items.summary_zh: PRQL 提供一种管线化查询语言，可编译为 SQL，提升查询的可读性与组合性，并便于与现有数据库对接，可能改变数据分析管线的构建方式。

items.title_en: The Lighthouse: How extreme isolation transforms the body and mind (2020)
items.title_zh: 灯塔：极端孤立如何改变身体与大脑
items.summary_en: The Lighthouse article reviews how extreme isolation affects the body and mind, with implications for space missions, polar expeditions, and remote work. It highlights changes in sleep, stress responses, and cognitive function under prolonged confinement.
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨极端孤立对身体和大脑的影响，涉及太空任务、极地探险及远程工作的启示。长期封闭环境下的睡眠、压力反应与认知功能变化被详细揭示。

items.title_en: The Musidex: A physical music library for the streaming era
items.title_zh: Musidex：面向流媒体时代的实体音乐库
items.summary_en: The Musidex presents a physical library concept designed for the streaming era, combining metal shelves and metadata-driven organization to help users manage large music collections alongside streaming access.
items.summary_zh: Musidex 提出一个面向流媒体时代的实体音乐库概念，围绕硬件载体与元数据组织来管理大规模音乐收藏并支持流媒体访问。

items.title_en: How to train your program verifier
items.title_zh: 如何训练你的程序验证器
items.summary_en: The post surveys practical approaches to training program verifiers, highlighting how to combine spec-driven data with automated proof search to improve reliability. It covers datasets, tooling, and evaluation strategies to make verifiers more reliable in real-world code.
items.summary_zh: 文章概述训练程序验证器的实用方法，强调通过将规范数据与自动化证明技术结合来提升验证能力。内容涵盖数据生成、工具链与在真实代码中的评估策略。

items.title_en: Emulating Goto in Scheme with Continuations
items.title_zh: 在 Scheme 中用 Continuations 模拟 goto
items.summary_en: An exploration of using continuations to implement goto-like control flow in Scheme. It demonstrates the expressive power of non-linear execution and informs discussions on language design and compilers.
items.summary_zh: 通过 Continuations 在 Scheme 中实现类似 goto 的控制流，展示了非线性执行的表达力，并对语言设计与编译器实现的讨论提供洞见。

items.title_en: What Is a Centipawn Advantage?
items.title_zh: 何为百步棋分（centipawn）优势？
items.summary_en: Centipawn advantage is a unit used by chess engines to quantify how far the position is from equality. The article explains interpretation, how it translates to practical gains, and its limits when the position is highly complex.
items.summary_zh: 百步棋分是象棋引擎用来量化局面领先程度的单位，能帮助理解评估值。文章解释了该单位的解读、对实际优势的转化，以及在复杂局面中的局限性。

items.title_en: Show HN: A geometric analysis of Chopin's Prelude No. 4 using 3D topology
items.title_zh: 用三维拓扑分析肖邦前奏曲第四首
items.summary_en: A geometric case study of Chopin's Prelude No. 4 using 3D topology reveals structural relationships in harmony, offering a novel mathematical lens on classical music.
items.summary_zh: 用三维拓扑对肖邦前奏曲第四首进行几何分析，揭示和声中的结构关系，提供一种新颖的数学视角来理解古典音乐。

items.title_en: A NASA Engineer Discovered a World of Semi Truck Aerodynamics by Accident
items.title_zh: 一名 NASA 工程师偶然发现半挂车空气动力学的新世界
items.summary_en: A NASA engineer’s accidental research leads to new aerodynamic insights for semi-trucks, with potential fuel-efficiency gains, drag reductions, and implications for highway transport.
items.summary_zh: 一位 NASA 工程师偶然发现的半挂车空气动力学新现象，可能带来燃油效率提升和更低阻力，对公路运输影响深远。

items.title_en: Baby chicks pass the bouba-kiki test, challenging a theory of language evolution
items.title_zh: 小鸡通过 Bouba-Kiki 测试，挑战语言进化理论
items.summary_en: Baby chicks pass the Bouba-Kiki test, suggesting that perceptual biases used to map sounds to shapes may not be unique to humans. The finding questions a central assumption about how language evolves, indicating that some foundational cognitive biases could be shared with other species.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现小鸡也能完成 Bouba‑Kiki 测试，表明将声音与形状关联的感知偏好并非人类独有。此结果对语言进化核心假设提出挑战，提示某些基础认知偏好可能在其他物种中也存在。

items.title_en: What is f(x) ≤ g(x) + O(1)? Inequalities With Asymptotics
items.title_zh: 渐近不等式：f(x) ≤ g(x) + O(1) 的含义
items.summary_en: The post explains how to interpret f(x) ≤ g(x) + O(1) in asymptotic analysis, clarifying how constant terms affect practical bounds. It helps distinguish between tight mathematical bounds and real-world performance implications.
items.summary_zh: 文章讲解了渐近分析中 f(x) ≤ g(x) + O(1) 的含义，阐明常数项在实际界限中的影响，帮助区分严格的数学界限与实际性能的关系。

items.title_en: Generalized Sequential Probability Ratio Test for Families of Hypotheses [pdf]
items.title_zh: 广义序贯似然比检验（多假设族）[PDF]
items.summary_en: A statistical note introduces GSPRT for testing multiple hypotheses in a sequential framework, useful for streaming data, adaptive experimentation, or real-time decision-making.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍了广义序贯似然比检验（GSPRT）在一族假设的序贯框架下的应用，适用于流数据、自适应实验和实时决策。

items.title_en: Lords of the Ring
items.title_zh: 擂台之王：文化政治、相扑与权力
items.summary_en: An examination of power dynamics in sumo culture and its intersection with politics and media. The piece uses sumo as a lens to discuss how tradition and modernity collide in national identity and cultural influence.
items.summary_zh: 通过对相扑文化中的权力结构及其与政治、媒体的交叉影响进行考察，以相扑作为镜头探讨传统与现代性在国家认同与文化影响力中的冲突与融合。

items.title_en: Scent, in Silico
items.title_zh: 计算机模拟中的气味研究：Scent, in Silico
items.summary_en: Scent, in Silico discusses computational approaches to scent design and fragrance discovery, highlighting how AI-assisted chemistry could accelerate product development in perfumery and beyond.
items.summary_zh: 《计算机模拟中的气味研究：Scent, in Silico》探讨了香味设计与香水发现的计算方法，强调 AI 辅助的化学在香料与相关领域的研发提速潜力。

items.title_en: Typed Assembly Language
items.title_zh: 类型化汇编语言
items.summary_en: Typed Assembly Language introduces types into low-level code to enforce safety guarantees at the assembly boundary. This Cornell project explores safeguarding interfaces between high-level type systems and low-level execution, paving paths toward more secure systems.
items.summary_zh: 类型化汇编语言在底层代码中引入类型，从而在汇编边界上提供安全保障。该计划将高层类型系统与低层执行结合，帮助推导正确性并提高系统安全性，推动编译器安全设计的研究。

items.title_en: Microspeak: Escrow
items.title_zh: Microspeak: 托管
items.summary_en: Microspeak: Escrow explains the software escrow concept—holding code or assets in trust for future access—and why it matters to customers and vendors.
items.summary_zh: Microspeak: Escrow 解释软件托管的概念——为未来访问而托管代码或资产，以及它对客户与厂商的重要性。
